They may have given up on him, but he won't give up on them.

[first lines]::Lt. Rod Blake: Oh, hello, I'm Rod Blake, chief investigator for the Nevada state troopers. Cutthroats and big mouths are to be expected in my line of work. Maybe this kind of cutthroat will surprise you.::[indicates a fish mounted on the wall]::Lt. Rod Blake: Nevada's lakes are famous for its big trout. The record cutthroat weighed 41 pounds out of Pyramid Lake; a mackinaw weighing 30 pounds came out of Tahoe and the bigmouth bass, of course, are in every lake. They figure in a case we call \The Black Leaper\"."

Two promotional posters for the movie were released during the Comic Con in 2008. Both featured 'Rose McGowan (I)' (qv), dressed as Red Sonja with fierce red hair. On one she was licking blood from a sword and on the other she was kneeling on a pile of skulls with red plots flying around her. Both posters promoted the movie to be released in 2009. It was never released that year.
